title: Story Stones
description: Choose painted story stones, say what happens next, and watch each choice stamp into a one-of-a-kind tale.
learningGoals: Invent characters, settings, and events for an original narrative
Use story vocabulary while speaking in full sentences
Retell a short three-part story aloud
interactionModel: listen to a story prompt, tap an open-ended stone choice, and tell that part of the story aloud
feedbackModel: Every choice pops and sparkles into the journal, receives a warm spoken story continuation, and returns in the celebratory recap.

modes.title: Castle Tale
modes.skill: inventing a beginning, middle, and ending

modes.title: Ocean Tale
modes.skill: oral storytelling with character, setting, and event vocabulary

credits: QLOBE Kids contributors; placeholder emoji only (see ASSETS.md).
